privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world Celestrak TLE orbital data provided in the environment's `stations.txt` file, which accurately contains the ISS (ZARYA) corresponding to NORAD ID 25544. The task requires calculating visible passes over the real-world Griffith Observatory using the verified coordinates 34.1184 N, 118.3004 W (-118.3004), and 350m altitude. The verifier strictly tests for passes with a minimum elevation of 25.0 degrees and 'V' (Visible) pass configurations, exported correctly to '/home/ga/Documents/iss_visible_passes.txt'.
